message:
fix(freeze): add proper refcount handling for loc8 opcodes

The get_loc8, put_loc8, put_loc_check, set_loc8, and get_loc0_loc1
opcodes were missing proper reference counting for ref types:

- get_loc8/get_loc0_loc1: Now dup ref types when pushing to stack
- put_loc8/put_loc_check: Now free old ref type before overwriting
- set_loc8: Now free old and dup new (stack keeps copy too)

This fixes the Gaussian Blur benchmark crash where the coeff array
was prematurely freed after the first convolveRGBA call because
get_loc8 wasn't duping it before pushing to the call stack.
